message:
chore(beads): add open issues for test coverage gaps (linalg batch, financial, polynomial, misc ufuncs)

Track four new issues for test suites not yet written: linalg batch ops
and random permuted/state, financial functions (fv/pv/pmt/etc.),
polynomial families (Chebyshev/Hermite/Laguerre), and miscellaneous
ufuncs (busday, bitwise_count, histogram2d/dd, convolve2d, vecdot).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
